title: Otsu,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Otsu, : cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Otsu is a city in with a population of 345,000. A lakeside city on the shores of Lake Biwa, Japan’s largest lake, offering natural beauty and easy access to Kyoto.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
